TimeEntry.Notes:
Weekly maintenance tasks performed on the below-listed machines -

BRA001, BW-ACCT01, BWWS006-PC, BWWS007-PC, BWWS004-PC.
Checked for and applied the latest security patches and updates

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Maintenance Window : BWH : 9pm Friday to 3am Saturday and 9pm Saturday to 3am Sunday PST
TimeEntry.Notes: Verify the patch management in ManageEngine for approved Highly vulnerable BWH patches on the specified Machine. Ensure that all machines are checked for pending updates, and then deploy and install t

TimeEntry.Title: BWWS014-PC- Cyber security(malware bytes agent) stucked in portal with expired
TimeEntry.Notes: Login on malware bytes portal and found mentioned machine was stucked on expired screen for cyber security agent.So Login on machines and restarted a scanning and wait till completed.Also verified

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.06.17806.0)updated on machine:- BWWS019-PC, BWWS006-PC, BWWS008-PC, BWWS016-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to machines (BWWS019-PC, BWWS006-PC, BWWS008-PC, BWWS016-PC) were running on an older crowd strike version. So, tried to push the sensor from the portal. but it did not work. So connected

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes scan required BWWS029-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Malwarebytes portal and found that a scan is needed on the (BWWS029-PC). Pushed the command for scanning. Verified that scan completed successfully without any issues found. Hence clos

TimeEntry.Title: Verifying devices in MalwareBytes for BWH, machines are offline & require scans
TimeEntry.Notes: Verifying devices in MalwareBytes for BWH, few machines are offline & require scans

TimeEntry.Title: CrowdStrike Agent Ver. 7.05.17706.0 updated with new VER. 7.06.17806.0 on the following machine- BWLAP-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewing the CrowdStrike portal, we found that the following machines - BWLAP-01 had a pending CrowdStrike update. So I updated the Crowdstrike agent Ver. 7.06.17806.0 via the portal. Use the update

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes scan required on the following machines - BWH-HQ-RDP-01, BWH-HQ-IIS-01, BWH-HQ-APP-01.

TimeEntry.Title: BWH-HQ-RDP-01-Cyber security scan(malware bytes) stucked in portal
TimeEntry.Notes: Login on malware bytes portal and found some machines require malware bytes scanning or some machines were stucked in expired so login on all below server and run scanning,also wait till completed.

TimeEntry.Title: Moved old backup from Production storage to New Backup Storage
TimeEntry.Notes: Moved old backup from Production storage to New Backup Storage

TimeEntry.Title: Failure Notification for Automate Patch Deployment task-BWH-TASK
TimeEntry.Notes:
Downloaded and installed below patches on Domain Servers. rescanned the patches from portal, now it shows in Healthy System

KB5032336, KB5032478, 2023-11 Cumulative Update for .NET Framewor

TimeEntry.Title: High-priority basis Malwarebytes scan required: - BWH-Sales-Sur-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Malwarebytes portal and found that a scan is needed on the device (BWH-Sales-Sur-01) Pushed the command for scanning. Verified that scan completed successfully without any issues fo

TimeEntry.Title: Onboard the device for client.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the machine and then download and install all following security tools and basic application on the machine. After that download and install all pending security updates on the machine.

TimeEntry.Title: Missing group tag added on machine- DESKTOP-EPTIAEB
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed the CrowdStrike portal and observed that DESKTOP-EPTIAEB machine was pending group tagging. To address this, I assigned the necessary CrowdStrike tag to this machine DESKTOP-EPTIAEB.

TimeEntry.Title: Remove inactive computer BWWS020-PC BWWS013-PC from Malwarebytes and my remote portal

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes scan required: BWWS024-PC, BWws003-PC, BWWS008-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Malwarebytes portal and found that a scan is needed on the (VDI034). Pushed the command for scanning. Verified that scan completed successfully without any issues found. Hence closing

TimeEntry.Title: New Hire
TimeEntry.Notes: Setup new workstation replace drive with SSD and imaged. Setup onsite to domain join and issuance for new hire.

TimeEntry.Title: DNS issue

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes scan pending on BWWS006-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the malwarebytes portal and found Malwarebytes scan pending on BWWS006-PC.Tried to scan from portal, but it was getting failed. So connected to the machine and checked for malwarebytes service

TimeEntry.Title: New Hire
TimeEntry.Notes: Installing office acrobat pro, zoom, newstar and inform xl.

TimeEntry.Title: PRTG alert probe device disconnected DC04
TimeEntry.Notes:
We received an alert from PRTG indicating that the probe device was disconnected.

Upon investigation from my remote, I found that DC04 was online, but on PRTG showing probe device disconnect
